revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]]}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||[[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]]}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]]}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||[[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]]}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]]}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||[[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]]}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]]}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||[[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]]}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]] [[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]] [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]] [[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]] [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Election_table here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]] [[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]] [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {| class="wikitable {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|mw-collapsible mw-collapsed}} {{#ifeq:{{{sortable|}}}|yes|sortable}}" style="text-align:right; font-size: 95%; {{#switch:{{lc:{{{align|}}}}}|=|none=|left=float:{{{align}}};margin-right:1em;|right=float:{{{align}}};margin-left:1em;|center|centre=margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;|#default=}}" {{#if:{{{collapsed|}}}|! colspan=12 style="text-align:center; font-weight:normal;" {{!}}|{{!}}+}} {{#if:{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}|{{#ifexist:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}||}}[{{fullurl:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}|action=edit}} e] • [[{{TALKPAGENAME:{{transclude|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|d]] |}}{{#if:{{{title|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{{title|{{{2}}}}}}}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Election table]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | align | collapsed | sortable | template_name | title | country }}{{Election table/category|country_auto={{If empty |{{#invoke:CountryAdjectiveDemonym|getCountryFromString|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}} |{{#invoke:Election table category|main|{{{template_name|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}|country_manual={{{country|}}}}} |} {{documentation}} [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|α]] [[Category:Pages using election table with incorrect edit links]] [[Category:Pages using election table with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
